name: Baltimore City Property Tax Records Guide
reason: Human-readable archival PDF; requires manual review/OCR and citation tracking before normalization.
source: Maryland State Archives / Baltimore City Archives
temporal_coverage: 1797-1915 tax records guide and series description
description: Guide to Baltimore City property tax records including general tax books, assessor tax records, and field assessor work books.
future_work: Extract series/year/roll references into data/archival/sources and normalize owner/address/value events with confidence-scored joins.

name: Baltimore City Property Tax Records Online Guide
reason: Research guide page; use as source index, not as a directly ingestible data layer.
temporal_coverage: 1797-1915 digitized tax records; assessor records 1800-1867; field assessor work books 1837-1896
description: Research guide describing digitized Baltimore property tax records and access requirements.

name: Maryland SDAT Real Property Data Search
reason: Official lookup/search application, not a bulk app layer. Use as a current assessment, ownership, and recent-sale verification source until a compliant bulk workflow exists.
source: Maryland State Department of Assessments and Taxation
temporal_coverage: Current real property assessment records with sale/transfer context exposed through the SDAT search workflow
description: Official Maryland real-property search for ownership, assessed values, property characteristics, and sales information.
join_strategy: Account/PIN where available; fallback to normalized BLOCKLOT/address against Baltimore parcel geometry.
future_work: Review access terms and build a compliant resolver for parcel-level assessment and sale history fields.

name: Maryland SDAT Real Property Sales History File
reason: Official service listing for sales-history data; requires file discovery, year/product selection, and schema review before ingestion.
source: Maryland State Department of Assessments and Taxation
temporal_coverage: Recent and historical Maryland real-property sales records, subject to SDAT product availability
description: Candidate source for parcel-level sale transaction history that can extend beyond the single SALEDATE/SALEPRIC fields in current Real Property Information.
join_strategy: SDAT account/PIN; fallback to normalized deed/account fields and Baltimore BLOCKLOT/address joins.
future_work: Locate downloadable sales-history files, normalize sale date/amount/instrument fields, and emit parcel value events with confidence scores.

name: Maryland Planning Parcel Data and Mapping / MD Property View
reason: Official statewide parcel/property product catalog; requires product/version selection and Baltimore City extract workflow before becoming an app layer.
temporal_coverage: Statewide parcel accounts, real-property characteristics, and sales products by available release year
description: Candidate bulk source for standardized parcel accounts, property characteristics, sales, and assessment-related fields.
join_strategy: Maryland parcel/account identifiers; fallback to Baltimore BLOCKLOT normalization and spatial joins.
future_work: Select release years, document schema, and generate normalized parcel assessment/sale history tables.

name: Baltimore City Archives Geography Sources
reason: Research guide for map/atlas sources; Sanborn and atlas sheets require georeferencing before use.
temporal_coverage: Historic maps and atlases, including Sanborn updates through the 1950s in archive holdings
description: Guide to Sanborn maps, Bromley and Thompson atlases, and Baltimore City block maps.

name: Library of Congress Sanborn Fire Insurance Maps Guide
reason: Guide/search entry point; individual map sheets must be selected and georeferenced.
temporal_coverage: Historic Sanborn editions including Baltimore sheets where available
description: Library of Congress guide for searching Sanborn fire insurance map holdings.

name: Baltimore Permit History Request
reason: Request workflow for archived permits/property files; not bulk machine-readable.
temporal_coverage: Older permits, citations, building plans, inspection notes, certificates, occupancy reports
description: Official workflow for requesting older permit and property records from Baltimore City.

name: Baltimore City Records Management
reason: Records management reference; used to locate archival record transfer and inventory workflows.
source: Baltimore City Department of Legislative Reference
description: Records Management Center information for temporary and permanent historical records.

name: Maryland Inventory of Historic Properties - Baltimore City Search
reason: Search interface and scanned survey files; needs record-by-record extraction.
description: Baltimore City entries in the Maryland Inventory of Historic Properties.

name: Maryland Inventory of Historic Properties Map Service
reason: Machine-readable map service exists, but parcel-level use needs schema review and Baltimore City coverage validation.
description: Statewide MIHP map service candidate for future historic-property overlays.

name: Baltimore 311 Customer Service Requests 2026
reason: Official current-year dataset exists, but the city has shifted to year-specific hosted layers. We should confirm the stable download/API pattern before automating pulls.
description: 311 service requests with request type, status, and location. High-value parcel distress and service-response source.
join_strategy: Spatial join to parcel or nearest parcel; preserve request category and status history.

name: Baltimore Liquor Licenses
reason: Official queryable table exists, but it is non-spatial. Needs address cleaning and geocoding before it becomes a parcel-map layer.
description: Liquor license table with trade name, class, status, and address fields.
join_strategy: Normalize and geocode AddrStreet plus ZIP to parcel; use license number as stable business key.

name: Maryland Food License and Permit Guidance
reason: Official licensing guidance exists, but no clean Baltimore parcel-ready dataset has been verified yet.
description: Reference page for food facility permitting and licensing. Candidate starting point for restaurant and food-business permit data.

name: Maryland Courts Dashboards
reason: Official dashboard source for court caseload and housing-related aggregate metrics, but not yet a parcel-address event feed.
description: Official Maryland Courts dashboards, including high-level caseload and housing-related reporting.

name: Maryland Court Records Access
reason: Court records are official but not open bulk parcel data. Any eviction or housing-court workflow needs access review and a compliant extraction path.
description: Official court-record access page covering District Court civil judgment and satisfaction data and other record access methods.

name: Baltimore Lien Certificate Request Workflow
reason: Useful for tax/liens workflow documentation, but not a bulk machine-readable delinquency dataset.
description: Official lien certificate request workflow for Baltimore City. Relevant for tax-delinquency and title-risk research.

name: Lead Paint Violation Notices
reason: Human-readable PDF notices rather than a clean layer or API feed. Still useful as evidence that address-level lead enforcement data exists.
description: Lead paint violation notice document with address-level enforcement context.
